zh.lifeSummary: 當Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll於大約1177年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn69歲，母親Nest verch Madog54歲。他和Ann verch Liewdyn至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1245年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll于大约1177年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn69岁，母亲Nest verch Madog54岁。他和Ann verch Liewdyn至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1245年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

en.lifeSummary: When Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll was born about 1177, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn, was 69 and his mother, Nest verch Madog, was 54. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Ann verch Liewdyn. He died in 1245, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.of,Cyfeiliog,Montgomeryshire,Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll est né environ 1177, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Madog, avait 54 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Ann verch Liewdyn. Il est décédé en 1245, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll um 1177 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn 69 und seine Mutter Nest verch Madog 54. Er hatte mit Ann verch Liewdyn mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll è nato il circa 1177 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn, aveva 69 anni e il suo madre, Nest verch Madog, aveva 54 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Ann verch Liewdyn. Morì nel 1245, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyllが約1177年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarnは69歳，母Nest verch Madogは54歳であった。彼はAnn verch Liewdynとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1245年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll(이)가 대략 1177년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn(은)는 69세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest verch Madog(은)는 54세였다. 그는 Ann verch Liewdyn(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll nasceu aproximadamente 1177, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn, tinha 69 anos e sua mãe, Nest verch Madog, tinha 54 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Ann verch Liewdyn. Ele faleceu em 1245, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ro.of,Cyfeiliog,Montgomeryshire,Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll родился около 1177 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Madog, 54. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Ann verch Liewdyn. Он умер в 1245 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gronwy ap Einion ap Seissyll nació aproximadamente 1177, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Einion ap Seisyll, Lord of Mathafarn, tenía 69 años y su mamá, Nest verch Madog, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Ann verch Liewdyn. Murió en 1245, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
